_comment: Per-scraper override file. The unified config/scraper_settings.json wins via load_settings priority — this file is only consulted if the unified config doesn't have a 'city_league_analysis' section. start_date is auto-synced from format_window.jp_release_date by update_sets.apply_format_window_to_scraper_settings on every weekly run, so don't hand-edit it.
